com.samsung.health.device_profile.description: Information about devices synced with Samsung Health (e.g., smartwatches, trackers).

com.samsung.health.ecg.description: ECG readings measuring electrical activity of the heart to monitor rhythm.

com.samsung.health.floors_climbed.description: Daily count of stairs or elevation climbed (in floors).

com.samsung.health.food_info.description: Reference lookup data for foods, calorie content, and macro breakdown.

com.samsung.health.food_intake.description: Logged meals, ingredients, nutritional values, and time consumed.

com.samsung.health.height.description: Historical logs of physical height measurements.

com.samsung.health.nutrition.description: Daily summary of total consumed fats, protein, carbs, and micronutrients.

com.samsung.health.sleep_stage.description: Fine-grained timeline of sleep cycles (Awake, REM, Light, Deep sleep).

com.samsung.health.user_profile.description: Personal health profile statistics (birthdate, gender, activity level).

com.samsung.health.weight.description: Body mass records including weight, body fat %, muscle mass, and BMI.

com.samsung.shealth.activity.day_summary.description: Summary of active minutes, calories burned, and overall daily goals.

com.samsung.shealth.activity.goal.description: Target goals for daily active time, active energy, and steps.

com.samsung.shealth.activity_level.description: Chronological classification of active states (Sedentary, Light, Active, etc.).

com.samsung.shealth.alerted_heart_rate.description: Automated alert logs for unusually high or low heart rates.

com.samsung.shealth.badge.description: Gamification badges earned by meeting health and fitness milestones.

com.samsung.shealth.best_records.description: All-time personal fitness records (e.g. max steps in a day, longest walk).

com.samsung.shealth.blood_pressure.description: Systolic, diastolic, mean arterial pressure, and pulse logs.

com.samsung.shealth.breathing.description: Logs of deep breathing exercises and duration.

com.samsung.shealth.calories_burned.deta.description: Detailed time-series of passive and active calories burned.

com.samsung.shealth.daily_activity.goal.description: Targets and completion status of daily fitness tasks.

com.samsung.shealth.exercise.description: Recorded physical workouts containing duration, distance, pace, and calories.

com.samsung.shealth.exercise.weather.description: Environmental weather conditions recorded during exercise sessions.

com.samsung.shealth.food_favorite.description: User-defined list of frequently eaten or favorite foods.

com.samsung.shealth.food_frequent.description: System-generated list of foods consumed most often.

com.samsung.shealth.food_goal.description: Nutrient intake targets set by the user (daily calorie limits).

com.samsung.shealth.goal_history.description: Historical modifications to user-set fitness goals.

com.samsung.shealth.hsp.references.description: Reference values and baseline indices used by Samsung Health.

com.samsung.shealth.insight.message_noti.description: System generated recommendations, trends, and message notifications.

com.samsung.shealth.permission.description: Access levels and read/write authorizations granted to the app.

com.samsung.shealth.preferences.description: User preferences for notifications, units, and dashboard visibility.

com.samsung.shealth.report.description: Aggregated weekly or monthly health summaries and progress cards.

com.samsung.shealth.rewards.description: Fitness program rewards and challenges records.

com.samsung.shealth.service_preferences.description: Underlying background settings for Samsung health synchronization.

com.samsung.shealth.sleep.description: Summary profiles for sleep sessions containing total duration and quality.

com.samsung.shealth.sleep_combined.description: Aggregated nightly sleep records combined with external parameters.

com.samsung.shealth.sleep_data.description: Detailed actigraphy logs showing physical movement during sleep.

com.samsung.shealth.sleep_raw_data.description: Raw measurements from wearable sensors for sleep detection.

com.samsung.shealth.sleep_snoring.description: Logs of detected snoring events including timestamp and audio duration.

com.samsung.shealth.social.public_challe.description: Global user challenges and global step ranking stats.

com.samsung.shealth.social.service_statu.description: Social connectivity, friend invites, and profile status.

com.samsung.shealth.stand_day_summary.description: Hourly active/standing counts to encourage reducing sedentary time.

com.samsung.shealth.step_daily_trend.description: Historical daily total steps, distance, and calorie logs.

com.samsung.shealth.stress.description: Calculated stress index over time based on heart rate variability (HRV).

com.samsung.shealth.tracker.heart_rate.description: Continuous heart rate measurements in beats per minute (BPM).

com.samsung.shealth.tracker.pedometer_da.description: Consolidated pedometer step data grouped per day.

com.samsung.shealth.tracker.pedometer_re.description: Recommendations and auto-generated insights on walking goals.
